sentences: The cross-attention module in the <ENT_008> network needs high-quality input embeddings to predict accurate bounding boxes and class labels.
The high-quality content embeddings increase the training convergence difficulty.
<ENT_021> <REF_014> presents a conditional cross-attention mechanism to solve the training convergence issue of <ENT_008>.
It differs from the simple <ENT_008> by input keys <MATH_077> and input queries <MATH_078> for cross-attention.
In <FIG_004>, the yellow box represents conditional-<ENT_008>.
The conditional queries are obtained from 2D coordinates along with the embedding output of the previous decoder layer.
